Published: May 10, 2026 | Last reviewed: May 10, 2026

Flagyl 400 mg — Uses, Dosage, Side Effects Pakistan

TL;DR — Key Takeaways
  • Flagyl = metronidazole, anaerobic bacteria aur parasites ke khilaaf
  • Common uses: amoebiasis, giardiasis, BV, dental abscess
  • Alcohol ke saath bilkul nahi — severe reaction
  • Pet kharab aur metallic taste common side effects
  • 1st trimester pregnancy mein avoid

Flagyl Tablet Kya Hai?

Flagyl Sanofi-Aventis ka brand name hai metronidazole ke liye. Yeh antibiotic + antiparasitic hai jo specifically anaerobic bacteria (oxygen-free environment mein pelnay wale) aur parasites ke khilaaf kaam karta hai.

Flagyl — Quick Facts
Generic nameMetronidazole
ClassNitroimidazole antibiotic
Strengths200 mg, 400 mg, 500 mg, syrup, IV, vaginal gel
OTCPrescription only
Pakistan price~150-250 PKR for 14 tablets

Flagyl Kis Liye Use Hoti Hai?

1. Amoebiasis (Pakistan Mein Bohat Aam)

Entamoeba histolytica se intestinal infection — bahar ke kharab khaane/paani se. Symptoms: bloody diarrhea, pet dard. Pakistan mein hot summer mein peak.

2. Giardiasis

Giardia parasite — chronic diarrhea, gas, bloating, weight loss.

3. Bacterial Vaginosis (BV)

Aurato mein vaginal odor aur discharge — Flagyl tablet ya gel.

4. Trichomoniasis

STD — both partners ka treatment zaruri.

5. Dental Infections

Tooth abscess, gum disease — Augmentin ke saath combination.

6. C. Difficile Colitis

Antibiotic ke baad severe diarrhea.

7. H. Pylori (Stomach Bacteria)

Triple therapy mein: Risek + Amoxicillin + Flagyl.

8. Surgical Prophylaxis

Bowel surgery se pehlay.

Dosage

Amoebiasis800 mg three times daily x 5-10 din
Giardiasis2 grams once daily x 3 din OR 400 mg three times daily x 5 din
Bacterial Vaginosis400 mg twice daily x 7 din
Trichomoniasis2 grams single dose OR 400 mg twice daily x 7 din
Dental infection400 mg three times daily x 5 din

Khaane ke saath lein — pet upset kam hota hai. Course pura karein.

Side Effects

Common:

  • Mitli, ulti
  • Metallic taste in mouth (signature side effect)
  • Sir dard
  • Bhook na lagna
  • Pesab dark colored hona
  • Furry tongue

Serious:

  • Severe allergic reaction
  • Peripheral neuropathy (long-term use)
  • Seizures (rare)
  • Stevens-Johnson syndrome

Alcohol Ke Saath BILKUL Nahi!

Disulfiram-like reaction: Alcohol ke saath Flagyl ya iske 48 ghante baad alcohol pina:

  • Shadeed mitli aur ulti
  • Sir dard
  • Flushing aur sweating
  • Dil ki dharkan tez
  • BP gir jana
  • Severe cases mein death possible

Cough syrups aur mouthwash mein bhi alcohol check karein.

Loose motion, amoebiasis ya bacterial infection ka shubha? Ilaaj AI pe doctor se mashwara — sahi diagnosis aur prescription.

Doctor Se Milein

Pregnancy aur Breastfeeding

  • 1st trimester: Avoid karein
  • 2nd-3rd trimester: Doctor mashware se
  • Breastfeeding: Single high dose ke baad 12-24 ghante feed na karwayein

Drug Interactions

  • Warfarin: Bleeding risk
  • Lithium: Toxicity
  • Phenytoin: Effect badhata hai
  • Disulfiram: Psychosis ka khatra

Pakistan Mein Brands

  • Flagyl (Sanofi-Aventis)
  • Metronidazole generic
  • Metsil (Sami)
  • Trichozole

Conclusion

Flagyl Pakistan mein amoebiasis, giardiasis aur dental infections ka workhorse antibiotic hai. Sirf doctor parchee se lein, course pura karein, aur alcohol bilkul nahi. Treatment ke dauran aur 48 ghante baad bhi. Ilaaj AI pe sahi diagnosis ke liye doctor consultation, ghar baithe.

Frequently Asked Questions

Flagyl tablet kis liye use hoti hai?
Flagyl (metronidazole) anaerobic bacteria aur parasites ke khilaaf antibiotic hai. Pakistan mein common uses: amoebiasis (bloody diarrhea), giardiasis, bacterial vaginosis, trichomoniasis, dental infections, H. pylori (stomach bacteria), aur C. difficile colitis. Sirf doctor parchee se. Course pura karein.
Flagyl ki dosage kya hai?
Amoebiasis: 800 mg three times daily x 5-10 din. Giardiasis: 2 grams once x 3 din. Bacterial vaginosis: 400 mg twice daily x 7 din. Trichomoniasis: 2 grams single dose. Dental infection: 400 mg three times daily x 5 din. Khaane ke saath lein. Doctor situation pe dose adjust karta hai.
Flagyl ke saath alcohol kyun nahi?
Flagyl + alcohol = disulfiram-like reaction — shadeed mitli, ulti, sir dard, flushing, dil ki dharkan tez, BP gir jana. Severe cases mein death possible. Yeh treatment ke dauran aur 48 ghante baad bhi. Cough syrups aur mouthwash mein bhi alcohol check karein.
Flagyl ke side effects kya hain?
Common: mitli, ulti, metallic taste in mouth (signature side effect), sir dard, bhook kam, dark pesab, furry tongue. Serious (rare): peripheral neuropathy long-term use mein, seizures, severe allergic reactions. Khaane ke saath lene se pet upset kam hota hai.
Pregnancy mein Flagyl safe hai?
1st trimester mein avoid karein — fetal development pe asar ka khatra. 2nd-3rd trimester mein doctor mashware se safe ho sakti hai severe infections mein. Breastfeeding: single high dose (2g) ke baad 12-24 ghante feed na karwayein. Bacterial vaginosis ke liye topical gel preferred hai pregnancy mein.
